summary: Iter50 'Detectar disponibilidad antes de agendar' validated. All 11 unit tests in test_iter50_availability.py pass. Regression: 19 iter45 + 10 iter49 + 11 iter50 = 40 tests pass. Live endpoint POST /api/calendar/availability tested with 6 additional integration tests (auth 401, missing/invalid start_iso → 400, disconnected tenant returns connected:false available:true alternatives:[], <500ms response when disconnected, accepts Z-suffix ISO). All passing.
critical_code_review_comments: google_calendar_service.check_availability returns connected:False/available:True when tenant has no Calendar integration — correct fallback for normal bot flow.
Endpoint POST /api/calendar/availability uses get_current_user (401 si no auth) y valida start_iso con HTTPException 400 antes de llamar a Google. Buena defensa.
find_alternative_slots respeta business_hours (9-19), skip_sundays, max_alternatives, y prefiere mismo día con horas cercanas — toda la lógica cubierta por unit tests.
Pre-existing lint warnings en bot_flow.py (F541 f-strings, F821 ScoringEngine import dinámico) reportadas por main agent; no rompen runtime y están fuera del scope de iter50.
Endpoint disconnected response time: ~50-100ms (medido <500ms), confirma que NO se llama a Google API cuando no hay refresh_token (early-return en check_availability).

success_rate.backend: 100% (46/46: 11 iter50 unit + 19 iter45 + 10 iter49 + 6 iter50 live)

test_credentials: demo@inmobot.com / Demo123! (used for live endpoint tests)
seed_data_creation: None — used existing demo tenant which is NOT connected to Google Calendar (expected state per request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter50 fully validated for the disconnected-tenant happy path. Real Google Calendar conflict flow (busy slot + alternatives via WhatsApp interactive buttons) requires manual OAuth connection and was NOT tested end-to-end (out of scope per request). Bot handler _handle_alternative_slot_choice + _offer_alternative_slots in bot_flow.py were not exercised — that requires live WhatsApp simulation. Test files added: test_iter50_endpoint_live.py for regression of the auth/validation/disconnected paths.
